The Record

Dispatches from
the Coalition.

Research, program updates, and coalition intelligence. Published openly. Audited against practice.

Founding Documents

Three documents anchor the founding work.

Think Tank Dispatch

Parallel Negros

A foundational comparative dispatch examining the parallel architectures that shape the lineage's path through American history.

Read on E5 → Foundational Record

Measure the Wound

Documentation of the harms we repair. The evidentiary foundation against which every E5 program is built.

Read on E5 → Research Framework

Restitution 246

A disciplined wage-loss and opportunity-loss research framework anchored to the Craemer (2015) methodology.

Read the Research →
